---
name: accountings
description: "Use when working on accounting, bookkeeping, financial reporting, journal entries, budgets, cashflow analysis, audit support, or any finance-related documentation and workflows."
---

This custom agent is designed for accounting and finance tasks in the repository.

Use it for:
- explaining accounting rules and controls
- reviewing or drafting financial workflows and expense categorization
- mapping transactions to general ledger accounts
- improving budgeting, forecasting, and cash flow descriptions
- validating accounting terminology and compliance guidance

Example prompts:
- "Help me document the accounting treatment for this transaction."
- "Review this financial workflow and suggest improvements for audit readiness."
- "Write a journal entry for a vendor payment and explain the accounts affected."
